Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Katrina Pearson has been all over TV saying outrageous things.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Now, to be fair to her, she's out there as a surrogate for Donald Trump.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: It's a thankless job.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: The guy is a giant flip-flopper, says one crazy thing after another.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So, now, he flip-flopped on his central issue, immigration.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Before they got to go, we're going to kick them out, we're going to build a wall.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Now, he says they can stay if they pay a little bit of taxes,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: which, by the way, is no different than any of his Republican opponents in the primary.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And he lit into them during the privacy.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Oh, yeah, just pay a little bit of taxes.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Oh, yeah, that's amnesty.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Now, he's like, no, well, no, it's not amnesty as such, as such, right?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So, what the hell is Katrina Pearson going to say about it?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Well, this is funny. Let's watch.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: He hasn't changed his position on immigration.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: He's changed the words that he is saying.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: What he has always said from the beginning, he has changed.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: Is that he does not, that he, no, there's not a different message.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: He's using different words to give that message because everyone on the news is saying

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: that he's a bigot.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: That was funny.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: No, no, it's not a different message.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: It's different words.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Now, those different words say the exact opposite of the earlier words,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: but still not a different message.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Different words.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Hey, if you're a Trump supporter, come on.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: You really believe her?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: No, seriously, you look at that and go, yeah, he nailed it, man.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I mean, he was going to kick him out, but he's not anymore, but that's because it's just different words.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Hey, maybe, maybe you're that shallow and you'll believe anything he says.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: But I'm pretty sure that most of you are not buying it, including the Trump supporters.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: But I think today are a little to a lot pissed that he's waffling and flip-flopping on the biggest

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: issue he had. And you know why? Because of what she said at the end.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Because most people see him as a bigot.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So if you want to win an election, it helps to have most people on your side, not against you.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So now he's abandoning you guys because he thinks you guys look like bigots too.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And he's got to win an election. So hey, base. I'll see you later.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: But bye-bye doesn't mean I don't like you anymore. It's just different words.

Text: To catch our awesome post-game shows, join and become a member.
